task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into EventLog Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EventLog Analyzer dashboard or web interface indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile showing 'admin').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the HIPAA compliance report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Reports tab or section displaying a 'HIPAA' compliance report covering the monitored servers.

task_completion.description: Verify the log retention period is updated to 2555 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a settings, admin, or database retention page where the log retention period is explicitly entered or saved as 2555 days.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured an alert triggered by authentication failures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an alert configuration screen where the trigger criteria is set to 'authentication failure' (or similar login failure events) with a threshold of 1 or more events.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert profile is named appropriately.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the alert name field containing 'phi', 'unauthorized', 'hipaa', or 'patient' (e.g., 'PHI Unauthorized Access').

task_completion.description: Verify the HIPAA compliance report is exported to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog, download notification, or file manager showing 'hipaa_compliance_report.html' being saved to or existing in the ~/Desktop/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EventLog Analyzer web interface to configure settings and alerts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the EventLog Analyzer web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the exported report was generated by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be exported via the application's native export/download functionality. The agent should not open a text editor and manually type out a fake HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the retention settings and alerts were actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for confirmation messages, toast notifications, or the settings page showing the saved values, rather than just typing values into a form without clicking 'Save' or 'Apply'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required log retention period is exactly 2555 days. The alert profile name only needs to contain 'phi', 'unauthorized', 'hipaa', or 'patient' to be considered correct; the severity level (Critical) is not strictly enforced by the scoring scripts. The exported report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/hipaa_compliance_report.html.
